name: Poloma 8" Wall Sconce (Set of 2) - SCN4100 - Dark Walnut/Brass - Safavieh
description: Introducing the Poloma 8 inch wall sconce set, a perfect blend of dark walnut and brass that enhances any space. Crafted from sturdy iron and elegant glass, these sconces offer a touch of sophistication and warmth to your home decor. The rich dark walnut finish combined with the timeless brass accents creates a striking contrast that complements both contemporary and classic interiors. Each sconce in the set of two provides a soft, inviting glow, transforming your living room, hallway, or bedroom into a cozy retreat. Easy to install, the Poloma sconces are designed to bring style and function together seamlessly. Whether you are updating your space or adding a fresh focal point, these wall sconces provide a versatile lighting solution that elevates your ambiance with elegance and charm. Illuminate your surroundings with the artistic touch of the Poloma wall sconce set.
